author: Darlene R. Baumann
review: Beautiful place to live. Feels like in country setting with grounds to walk,feels like a preserve  with geese,deer,squirrels  and rabbits. I noticed 2 resident herons earlier this summer. People friendly.  Good access to two roads into town and freeways. Great donut shp,coffee and philly cheese sandwiches closeby.

author: Lauren Baker
review: Jourdan and her husband are extremely helpful and truly care about your experience! They helped to make our day more beautiful than I could have imagined.

author: Uno Mundo
review:
The only issue is my upstairs neighbor
makes noise during quiet time 10pm to 8am.

ownerResponse.text: We're very sorry to learn that you're experiencing frustrations due to noise transfer. That's never the type of feedback we want to hear from our guests. Please be assured that our residents' satisfaction is among our top priorities. Should this issue persist, please let us know right away by reaching out to us at 360-295-8200. We'll do all we can to help ensure you have a pleasant and comfortable living experience with us at Old Mill Village. Thank you.

author: Kyle Chapman
review: Amazing apartments that are slightly off the beaten path. Sandwiched between two beautiful parks with a amazing lakeside views and beach access. Good pricing, good people, and beautiful grounds for an affordable lease.

ownerResponse.text: Dear Jay, thank you so much for adding this 5-star rating of Old Mill Village. We work hard to provide a quality, enjoyable living experience for our residents, and we truly appreciate seeing that effort recognized.

author: Vincent Regimbal
review: Beautiful place to live right on lake whatcom
